channel.title: ZeroClaw on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in ZeroClaw on yexca'Blog

item.title: Local Deployment of ZeroClaw
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3.5-flash Back when OpenClaw was super popular, I wasn’t really a fan of using Node for deployment. The subsequent security vulnerabilities confirmed my doubts. Now, there are plenty of great forks. Since I prefer lightweight setups, I went with the lighter ZeroClaw. Since I’m deploying my own AI assistant, I don’t want my data uploaded to the cloud. So, the goal this time is to build a fully local private assistant.
